title: Tirucalia spinea
taxonomy: Tirucalia spinea is classified within the family Apocynaceae. This family, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family, is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The exact classification within the Apocynaceae family may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted as being part of this family.
